# Smart Deals Global

> Curated real-estate advisory surfacing 50+ smart property deals and distress deals across 10 global markets. We find properties with genuine price, payment-plan, or early-access advantage — including distress sales, motivated sellers, and below-market opportunities — and route them to international buyers with multilingual (English, Arabic, French, Russian) support.

Smart Deals Global operates as a cross-border property discovery desk, not a listings portal. Every deal is individually evaluated for pricing advantage, payment-plan favourability, projected rental yield, or pre-launch access. Discounts reach 23% and payment structures include 70/30, 60/40, 20/50/30, and up to 5-year post-handover plans.

## Markets

- **Dubai & Abu Dhabi, UAE** — secondary-market and off-plan, freehold areas open to all nationalities, ~4% DLD fee, no capital-gains or income tax on property.
- **Monaco** — exclusive collection, Monte Carlo focus.
- **France** — Paris primarily; residential and trophy assets.
- **Switzerland** — Swiss Riviera (Montreux, Lake Geneva).
- **Thailand** — Phuket; investment-grade villas and condos.
- **Azerbaijan** — Baku / Caspian coast.

## What we do

- Advise buyers at no fee (we are compensated by the developer or seller side).
- Handle fee structure: typical Dubai purchase = 4% DLD + ~2% agency + AED 4-5K admin = 6-7% total.
- Route multilingual sales support across four languages.

## Key pages

- [Home](https://smartdeals.global/): market map and smart-deal collection
- [Arabic](https://smartdeals.global/ar/)
- [French](https://smartdeals.global/fr/)
- [Russian](https://smartdeals.global/ru/)

## FAQ (matches FAQPage schema on the site)

- **What is a Smart Deal?** A property evaluated and selected for offering genuine value advantage through pricing, payment terms, rental yields, or early access.
- **Can foreigners buy property in Dubai?** Yes. Foreign nationals can purchase freehold property in designated areas across Dubai with no restrictions on nationality.
- **How do payment plans work for off-plan properties?** Payment plans vary by developer. Common structures include 70/30, 60/40, and 20/50/30 with some offering post-handover plans up to 5 years.
- **What fees should I expect when purchasing?** In Dubai, expect 4% DLD registration, ~2% agency commission, and AED 4-5K admin fees. Total typically 6-7% of property value.
- **Do you charge any fees for your service?** Our advisory service for buyers is complimentary. We are compensated by the developer or seller side.

## Property Types

- **Ready/Secondary Market** — Move-in ready properties with visible price advantage vs comparables, immediate entry, no construction risk
- **Off-Plan** — Early-stage pricing 2-10% below launch, flexible payment plans (70/30, 60/40, 20/50/30), capital appreciation potential
- **Exclusive Off-Market** — Private opportunities not publicly listed, relationship-driven access, preferential terms

## Why Smart Deals Global

- 500M+ AED portfolio value managed
- 15+ years combined real estate experience
- 10 global markets covered
- 50+ active curated deals
- No buyer fees — compensated by developer/seller side
- Multilingual team: English, Arabic, French, Russian
